div.div:
Pass 0: brief refresh (append_marker · move_to_closed · add_open · 9-pt validator · multi-step heuristic auto-rejects ambiguous closures)
Pass 1: ticket audit (auto-reject stale: TTL 7d / strategic-update closed / deliverable shipped / register match / plan-in-flight)
Pass 2: ticket propose (0-3 tickets / fire · leverage-ranked · strict_mode true default · stream-scoped · 5 active streams)
